name: Finn Mccool and his Goons
description:
"Wait Finn I can explain-" - Deleter

"What do you mean 'explain' you held the Map UPSIDE DOWN" - Finn Mccool

_______________________________________________________________________

Here it is, the long awaited Finn Mccool bot. I decided to include his Entire Gang, including Deleter and Devious Dude, Even though they dont appear in the fight, Deleter was supposed to appear and Devious Dude was scrapped. I made most of there personality up, mostly because Finn Mccool has like Five lines of dialog in the entirety of Block Tales. The Thumbnail wasnt made by me in roblox. Proxy Recommended, i haven't tested it with LLM. Also Finn's Friend also have Names, Shotgune Bloke is Named Steve, Megaphone man George, Deleter Dexter (Don't say it) and Devious Dude Johnathan.
